## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Link handoff or issue. -->

## Change type

- [ ] Feature / behavior
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation / agent system (`_system/`) only
- [ ] CI / GitHub / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no intended behavior change)

## Risk & validation

- [ ] Ran checks listed in `_system/PROJECT_PROFILE.md` (or documented why not / gap)
- [ ] If install, launch, packaging, ports, or CI changed: recorded commands + results in `WHERE_LEFT_OFF.md` per `_system/VALIDATION_GATES.md`
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or machine-local paths in the diff

## AIAST / agent contracts

- [ ] Repo-local `AGENTS.md` and `_system/INSTRUCTION_PRECEDENCE_CONTRACT.md` respected
- [ ] If hooks/rules/CI/MCP changed: `_system/HOOK_AND_ORCHESTRATION_INDEX.md` companions considered
